title: Review Day Problems - Solution Updated
content:
Hi Class,

The solutions to the Review Day Problems had not been updated after the Canvas Crash. 
I uploaded the new solution, which you can also find here: 1. Exam 2 - Review Day Problems - SOLUTIONS Download 1. Exam 2 - Review Day Problems - SOLUTIONS

Sorry for any inconvenience. The main difference was the AR problem solution. A few other problems had some minor wording updates. 

-Jeremiah
